Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c1 (seed+1) -- a clean heraldic shield crest (purple/orange/cream), the strongest 'clean bold silhouette' read of the 4 even though none of the 4 candidates rendered a literal crowned anvil. c0 had extra corner blade ornaments; c2 read as an odd mouse-eared shield (off-tone); c3 was a 9-panel concept grid with visible text.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse, background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); no normal map (flat icon per AssetSpec.NormalMap=false).
